structuredPlan.goal: Create a CEM-Source Fidelity analyzer that detects discrepancies between CEM declarations and actual source code implementations, catching bugs like the hx-carousel event name mismatch.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Analyzer detects phantom events (declared in CEM but not dispatched in source), specifically the hx-carousel hx-slide-change case
Analyzer detects missing events (dispatched in source but not declared in CEM)
Analyzer detects property default value mismatches between CEM and source
Analyzer detects attribute reflection mismatches (observedAttributes vs CEM reflects)
Analyzer is registered as dimension 12 with weight 10 and tier critical
Analyzer is wired into scoreComponentMultiDimensional() and uses mixin-resolver for inheritance chains
All tests pass against real helix hx-carousel and at least 3 wc-libraries components

tasks.title: Implement event fidelity extraction and comparison
tasks.description: Create packages/core/src/handlers/analyzers/cem-source-fidelity.ts with event extraction logic. Scan source code for dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('name')), this.dispatchEvent(new Event('name')), .emit('name'), Lit @event decorators, and FAST $emit() patterns. Compare against CEM declaration.events[] array. Assign -15 points per phantom event, -10 per missing event.

tasks.title: Implement property fidelity extraction and comparison
tasks.description: In cem-source-fidelity.ts, add property extraction logic. Scan for static properties = {}, @property() decorators, and static get properties(). Compare against CEM declaration.members[] where kind=field. Check default values (CEM default vs source initializer) and reflect attribute (CEM reflects: true vs source reflect: true / attributeChangedCallback).

tasks.title: Implement attribute reflection fidelity extraction
tasks.description: In cem-source-fidelity.ts, add logic to extract static observedAttributes and framework equivalents. Compare against CEM declaration.attributes[] array.

tasks.title: Implement proportional scoring model
tasks.description: In cem-source-fidelity.ts, implement 100-point scoring: 40 points for event fidelity (matched/total with phantom/missing penalties), 35 points for property fidelity (proportional match), 25 points for attribute reflection (proportional match). Return null if no source code available.

tasks.title: Register analyzer as dimension 12 in dimensions.ts
tasks.description: Modify packages/core/src/handlers/dimensions.ts to add CEM-Source Fidelity analyzer as dimension 12. Set weight: 10, tier: 'critical', confidence: 'heuristic'. Export analyzer function for use in health.ts.

tasks.title: Wire analyzer into health.ts scoring pipeline
tasks.description: Modify packages/core/src/handlers/health.ts scoreComponentMultiDimensional() function to invoke cemSourceFidelity analyzer. Ensure it leverages mixin-resolver for deep inheritance chain scanning via deep mode.

tasks.title: Create unit tests for event fidelity
tasks.description: Create tests/handlers/cem-source-fidelity.test.ts with test cases for: phantom events (CEM event not in source), missing events (source dispatch not in CEM), using real helix hx-carousel case where CEM declares 'hx-slide-change' but source dispatches 'hx-slide'.

tasks.title: Create unit tests for property and attribute fidelity
tasks.description: In tests/handlers/cem-source-fidelity.test.ts, add test cases for property default mismatches, attribute reflection mismatches, and null return when source unavailable.

tasks.title: Test against real helix and wc-libraries components
tasks.description: Add integration tests to cem-source-fidelity.test.ts that load real component sources from /Volumes/Development/booked/helix/packages/hx-library/ and at least 3 libraries from /Volumes/Development/booked/wc-libraries/. Verify analyzer produces correct scores and correctly identifies discrepancies.

tasks.title: Verify full test suite passes
tasks.description: Run complete test suite to ensure new analyzer integrates cleanly with existing code and all tests pass.

deviationRules.condition: Source code is unavailable for a component
deviationRules.action: Return null from analyzer to indicate verification is impossible, rather than assigning a default score

deviationRules.condition: Component uses minified or transpiled source that defeats regex extraction
deviationRules.action: Return null to avoid false positives from unreadable source

deviationRules.condition: Deep inheritance chains exceed practical scanning depth
deviationRules.action: Use mixin-resolver's maximum traversal depth limit to prevent performance degradation
Document in comments for future enhancement; fall back to generic dispatchEvent/emit regex patterns

deviationRules.condition: Event or property names match with case sensitivity differences
deviationRules.action: Apply case-insensitive comparison and note in score metadata
